title: Selectable PRIMARY runtime + runner spawn resolution (incl. provider overrides)

tests.summary: 12 passed (default->claude-code, engine from provides, fail-loud on uncomposed primary, provider env for ollama/deepseek/zai, vault fail-loud, base_url override, unknown provider throw)

review.summary: No correctness bugs; default behavior preserved by construction.

e2e.summary: pending — covered with S5 provider UI

codexReview.summary: r1: 2 findings (gateway provider-drop + explicit-uncomposed-primary) both fixed; r2 APPROVE — two-model agreement. S5 UI clean.

codexPwTest.summary: r1 fail: agent-sdk-runtime missing from library (the user wanted it selectable) -> FIXED (added to library.json). r2 PASS: independent verify of /compose grid+Runtimes, full runtime peer set (Claude Code/Agent SDK/Codex/Gemini) on /compose/runtimes, primary_runtime default, and /api/library ids — no console errors.

video.note: Per-beat vision gate PASS (3 content beats: Dev-faculties tier with Runtimes [S4]; Claude Code runtime fitting highlighted [S1]; primary_runtime selector = Default — Claude Code runtime + provider hint [S2/S5]). Navigation surface-tour (not an interaction arc) to avoid a write-race on the SHARED compositions/default; interaction proven by committed e2e (6/6) + unit tests.

notes.files: NEW src/lib/runtime-selection.ts (+ tests/runtime-selection.test.ts); types.ts GlobalConfig.primary_runtime (additive optional, disjoint from f45c7c61 hunks @25-245); runner.ts import + primary resolution before spawn branch + spawnGateway/spawnClaude env threading + buildRuntimeEntries helper (regions ~216/~894/~1050, disjoint from others' runner hunks @366-510); scripts/pty-operative.mjs providerLaunch.
notes.limitation: Provider-on-primary now wired for BOTH the direct-PTY path AND the gateway path (legacy + routed, via gateway-pty.mjs providerLaunch + initialTarget.provider). agent-sdk-as-primary still fails loud (not yet hosted as interactive orchestrator) — honest v1.
notes.behaviorPreserved: Default (no primary_runtime, default provider) sets only harmless marker env vars; GARRISON_MODEL/provider unchanged vs today.
